changes.reason: Router/profile split experiment: add the existing pullback_long_1dte concept to the VALID_1DTE_ONLY fallback set without hardening breakout_long_1dte. Prior direct 1DTE tightening cut profitable insurance, so the cleaner test is whether the router can separate pullback/reclaim-like 1DTE entries instead of pruning them.

Activate only the companion 1DTE pullback profile being added to the one-DTE router list. This keeps the experiment isolated to missing-0DTE/valid-1DTE routing and leaves VALID_0DTE profiles untouched.

recommendation.expected_effect: If the dormant 1DTE pullback companion is reachable, combined 1DTE fallback should retain the current profitable insurance while improving average MAE and exposure efficiency by moving reclaim-style entries away from breakout_long_1dte. Reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, VALID_0DTE metrics change materially, or 1DTE PnL/exposure deteriorates.
recommendation.label: one-dte-pullback-companion-router-probe
recommendation.rationale: The next experiment should avoid repeating failed direct 1DTE quality tightening and avoid global veto/TP changes. breakout_long_1dte is profitable but heat-heavy: 20 VALID_1DTE_ONLY trades, $1304 PnL, -123.7 average MAE, and -375.7 worst MAE. Prior hardening reduced score and PnL, so this tests a config-only profile split using the dormant pullback_long_1dte profile rather than pruning the existing 1DTE breakout edge.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributed $1304 over 20 trades with no slow >=12h trades, but average MAE was -123.7. Prior breakout_long_1dte gates damaged PnL, implying the issue is likely regime mixing rather than insufficient strictness.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The added profile may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades if router/profile ordering favors it too broadly.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains at least current $1304, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.7, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, and VALID_0DTE performance is unchanged.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long produced $2299.7 but owns the global worst MAE at -638.75. Broad structure pruning is unsafe because weak-structure buckets remain profitable.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Config-only proxies may block profitable weak-structure pullbacks; early-path or normalized state features are likely needed.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback entries with weak structure, low/negative VWAP acceleration, and delayed early profit.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Retain >=90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE toward <= -527 and improving total risk-adjusted score.
